---
title: "scRNA Annotation Review Report: decoupler"
date: today
jupyter: python3
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-expand: 3
    toc-location: left
    html-math-method: katex
    embed-resources: true
    page-layout: full
    html-table-processing: none
    theme: lumen
    fig-width: 10
    fig-height: 5
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import sys

from IPython.display import Markdown, display
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px

LIB_DIR = Path(".").resolve() / "lib"
if str(LIB_DIR) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(LIB_DIR))

from report_utils import format_table, load_report_context, package_versions_table, style_bar

ROOT = Path(".").resolve()
context = load_report_context(ROOT)
```

## Current Status

```{python}
display(
    Markdown(
        """
This is a **scaffold report** for a future Python-native **decoupler** review
layer. In this template, decoupler is planned as a **validation layer** rather
than a standalone label-transfer engine.
"""
    )
)
```

```{python}
status_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"field": "method", "value": "decoupler_review"},
        {"field": "implemented_in_runtime", "value": "no"},
        {"field": "intended_role", "value": "marker and pathway-based annotation review"},
        {"field": "selected_in_current_run", "value": "decoupler_review" in context["selected_methods"]},
    ]
)
format_table(status_df)
```

## Why This Layer Matters

```{python}
fit_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"strength": "marker interpretability", "why_it_matters": "helps explain or challenge classifier-driven labels"},
        {"strength": "pathway context", "why_it_matters": "adds functional support to ambiguous clusters"},
        {"strength": "review-oriented output", "why_it_matters": "fits best-practice annotation workflows that separate prediction from confirmation"},
    ]
)
format_table(fit_df)
```

```{python}
evidence_profile = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"dimension": "interpretability", "score": 5},
        {"dimension": "standalone labeling power", "score": 2},
        {"dimension": "marker-driven validation", "score": 5},
        {"dimension": "pathway context", "score": 4},
        {"dimension": "runtime complexity", "score": 3},
    ]
)
evidence_plot = px.bar(
    evidence_profile,
    x="dimension",
    y="score",
    title="Expected decoupler contribution profile",
    range_y=[0, 5.5],
)
style_bar(evidence_plot, height=420)
```

## Paper And Documentation Takeaways

The decoupleR / decoupler documentation and paper frame the method family as an
activity-inference toolkit rather than a direct single-label classifier. For
this template, that supports using decoupler as a review layer that strengthens
or questions a proposed annotation, especially through marker- or pathway-level
evidence.

```{python}
takeaways_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"takeaway": "activity inference rather than direct labeling", "implication": "best treated as validation, not as the only annotation source"},
        {"takeaway": "supports prior knowledge resources", "implication": "useful when curated marker or pathway sets exist"},
        {"takeaway": "cluster-level summaries are natural", "implication": "fits review of ambiguous clusters after classifier output"},
        {"takeaway": "interpretability is a strength", "implication": "good for explaining why a label does or does not fit"},
    ]
)
format_table(takeaways_df)
```

## Review Use Cases

```{python}
use_cases_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"use_case": "check a classifier-assigned cluster", "why_decoupler_helps": "adds interpretable marker or pathway evidence"},
        {"use_case": "compare two plausible lineage labels", "why_decoupler_helps": "makes the evidence structure visible rather than only returning one label"},
        {"use_case": "flag unresolved clusters", "why_decoupler_helps": "supports a review-needed decision without overcommitting to a final label"},
        {"use_case": "support final label write-up", "why_decoupler_helps": "summaries are easier to explain biologically than raw classifier scores"},
    ]
)
format_table(use_cases_df)
```

## Required Future Inputs

```{python}
config_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"key": "marker_review.marker_file", "meaning": "user-supplied marker set YAML"},
        {"key": "optional signature resource", "meaning": "external prior-knowledge collection"},
        {"key": "cluster_key", "meaning": "grouping level for review summaries"},
    ]
)
format_table(config_df)
```

## Planned Review Outputs

```{python}
planned_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"planned_section": "marker-score heatmap", "content": "cluster by candidate-label score matrix"},
        {"planned_section": "agreement summary", "content": "marker evidence versus classifier suggestion"},
        {"planned_section": "pathway activity view", "content": "functional context for uncertain clusters"},
        {"planned_section": "conflict table", "content": "clusters needing manual adjudication"},
    ]
)
format_table(planned_df)
```

## Planned Review Workflow

```{python}
workflow_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"step": "1", "action": "load marker or pathway resources", "goal": "define the biological evidence base"},
        {"step": "2", "action": "score clusters or cells", "goal": "quantify support for candidate identities"},
        {"step": "3", "action": "compare to classifier suggestions", "goal": "highlight agreement and conflict"},
        {"step": "4", "action": "update final review status", "goal": "accept, revise, or leave unresolved"},
    ]
)
format_table(workflow_df)
```

## Readiness Checklist

```{python}
checklist_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"task": "add decoupler dependency and runtime params", "status": "pending"},
        {"task": "write score tables into results/", "status": "pending"},
        {"task": "add cluster-level heatmaps and conflict summaries", "status": "pending"},
        {"task": "connect review outputs to final annotation workflow", "status": "pending"},
    ]
)
format_table(checklist_df)
```

```{python}
checklist_plot = px.bar(
    checklist_df.assign(done=[0, 0, 0, 0]),
    x="task",
    y="done",
    title="decoupler review-layer implementation status",
)
style_bar(checklist_plot, height=420)
```

## References Consulted

```{python}
references_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {
            "resource": "decoupler single-cell documentation",
            "role": "single-cell usage patterns and resource access",
            "link": "https://decoupler.readthedocs.io/en/stable/notebooks/scell/rna_sc.html",
        },
        {
            "resource": "decoupleR paper",
            "role": "method framing and prior-knowledge inference context",
            "link": "https://academic.oup.com/bioinformaticsadvances/article/2/1/vbac016/6544613",
        },
    ]
)
format_table(references_df)
```

## Session Info

```{python}
session_df = package_versions_table(["scanpy", "anndata", "pandas", "numpy", "plotly", "decoupler"])
format_table(session_df)
```
